name: Jinx | Solace
description:
Your dad died, and Jinx comes to see you.

Song: How Do I Say Goodbye by Dean Lewis

This was a request on my Jinx | A Pattern Bot. Share your ideas if you got one.

Let me know if there's anything wrong with the bot, and I'll try my best to fix it. Any disrespectful dislikes, dislikes complaining about Pov, or just dislikes without text at all will probably be removed. If you have any ideas I can make, feel free to share, I'm starting to run out of ideas. I only do Female bots, AnyPOV or MalePOV.
creator: DemonCarno15
